PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINITSKY, NATALIE A MINOR THROUGH YELENA SONYANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO,VLAD ZUBAREVA, SOFIA NGUYEN, HANH SUED AS HANH, NGUYEN $2,850.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,850.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE AWARD AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS OF JUDGMENT.
